title: Auto Extras Learner and New driver Plates pack, 2 x L and 2 x P, magnetic
description: Product Description Magnetic "L" and "P"plates These Learner plates comply to the department of transport regulations and are simple to fit and remove. With magnetic strips these Plates simply stick on as required. Best placed on a straight surface for maximum hold. These plates wont damage your vehicle as long as you stick to the good practise of cleaning both your car and 'L' plates each week. these are the cheaper and simpler option, not intended for prolonged use. Legal Disclaimer SET CONTAINS 2 "L" PLATES & 2 "P" PLATES THE "L" PLATES FOR WHILE DRIVING UNDER INSTRUCTION THE "P" PLATES FOR AFTER PASSING THE DRIVING TEST QUICK & EASY TO ATTACH USING MAGNETS THIS ITEM IS BRAND NEW
